_note: HAND-BUILT branch-coverage miniature for the S4 outline offline harness/tests. NOT a live corpus — the real drb_72 replay is the VM hamster (LAW II: fixtures live only under tests/fixtures/). Rows are plausible clinical claims chosen to exercise every code branch: a 3-member basket, a 2-member basket, four singletons incl. one with no title.

evidence.title: Tirzepatide 15mg HbA1c reduction
evidence.statement: tirzepatide 15mg reduced HbA1c by -2.1% vs placebo at 40 weeks

evidence.title: SURPASS-2 primary endpoint
evidence.statement: SURPASS-2: tirzepatide 15mg lowered HbA1c by -2.30% at 40 weeks

evidence.title: Semaglutide 1mg comparison
evidence.statement: semaglutide 1mg reduced HbA1c by -1.86% at 40 weeks in the same population

evidence.title: Patient forum thread on tirzepatide
evidence.statement: forum users report tirzepatide 15mg lowered their a1c by roughly 2 points

evidence.title: Weight-loss meta-analysis
evidence.statement: tirzepatide produced a 20.9% mean body-weight reduction across trials

evidence.title: GLP-1 cost analysis
evidence.statement: the US list price of tirzepatide remains substantially higher than older agents
adverse events were predominantly gastrointestinal, with nausea most common

evidence.title: Cardiovascular outcomes program
evidence.statement: SURPASS-CVOT is ongoing to test cardiovascular endpoints for tirzepatide

evidence.title: SURMOUNT-1 body weight
evidence.statement: tirzepatide 15mg reduced body weight by -20.9% at 72 weeks

ops.title: Cost
ops.reason: anchor the cost row and pull the adverse-events row into Cost
